data.title: OpenAI and Microsoft agree on restructuring for-profit arm, seeks approval from CA and DE lawmakers.
data.description: The company indicated that approval from policymakers in California and Delaware would be necessary as a part of the restructuring plan.

data.title: Dogecoin, BNB surge as Bitcoin, Ethereum reach monthly highs. BNB hits new all-time high while Dogecoin, Ethereum, Solana rise.
data.description: On Friday, BNB experienced a record-breaking all-time high price, with significant surges in the value of Dogecoin, Ethereum, and Solana as investors re-entered the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: ATA celebrates National Truck Driver Appreciation Week starting Sept. 14, honoring 3.6 million truck drivers.
data.description: In Washington on September 12, 2025, the American Trucking Associations announced the commencement of the 37th annual National Truck Driver Appreciation Week starting on Sunday, September 14. This week is dedicated to honoring approximately 3.6 million professional truck drivers in the United States. The event celebrates their vital contribution to the nation's transportation industry.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares Inc declared $356.25 cash dividend quarterly for its 5.70% Series I Preferred Stock.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on September 12, 2025, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated revealed that the Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend for the company's 5.70% Series I Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (Nasdaq: HBANM) at a rate of $356.25 per share.

data.title: Roundhill Video Games ETF (NERD) shifting to active management, moves listing from Nasdaq to Cboe BZX.
data.description: Roundhill Video Games ETF (NERD) will shift its management strategy from passive to active, and will also transfer its listing from Nasdaq to Cboe BZX. The news was revealed by Roundhill Investments, an ETF sponsor known for its focus on cutting-edge financial products. This transition marks a significant change for NERD, a well-known ETF in the video games sector.

data.title: Alliance Laundry Systems files registration statement for IPO with SEC on Form S-1. Global leader in commercial laundry equipment.
data.description: In Ripon, Wisconsin on September 12, 2025, Alliance Laundry Systems, a top provider of commercial laundry equipment worldwide, disclosed the submission of a registration statement on Form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC") concerning a proposed financial action.

data.title: Columbus McKinnon (Nasdaq: CMCO) to present at Sidoti Investor Small-Cap Conference on Sept. 17, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on September 12, 2025, Columbus McKinnon Corporation revealed its plan to participate in the upcoming September 2025 Sidoti Investor Small-Cap Conference. The conference is scheduled for September 17, 2025, at around 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Columbus McKinnon, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CMCO, will be presenting at this event.

data.title: Ispire Tech Inc. (NASDAQ: ISPR) to hold Q4 and FY 2025 earnings call on Sept.16, 2025 at 8:00am ET.
data.description: Ispire Technology Inc., a leading company in vaping technology and precision dosing, will be conducting its earnings conference call on Tuesday, September 16, 2025, starting at 8:00 am ET. This conference call will focus on discussing the financial performance and updates of the company. Ispire is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ISPR.

data.title: Cornerstone rebrands client portal as Atlas, with improved security and file management. September 12, 2025.
data.description: Alpharetta, Georgia - On September 12, 2025, Cornerstone Licensing Services unveiled the revamped Atlas platform with enhanced features including a user-friendly interface, improved security measures, and the introduction of AtlasVault for protected document sharing and file organization. This strategic rebranding aims to provide clients with a more efficient and secure portal experience.

data.title: Lifeway Foods doubles growth with strategic Waukesha expansion - a significant move; stage one completion announced.
data.description: Lifeway Foods, Inc., based in Morton Grove, Illinois, declared the accomplishment of the initial phase of its strategy to increase its operations. The company, listed on Nasdaq as LWAY, specializes in providing kefir and fermented probiotic products promoting a healthy microbiome. This progress is part of their goal to expand and enhance their offerings.

data.title: Mudd Advertising buys DealerTrend to boost automotive tech innovation. DealerTrend, founded in 2001, acquired by Mudd.Advertisement.
data.description: In Cedar Falls, Iowa on September 11, 2025, Mudd Advertising revealed their purchase of DealerTrend, Inc., an automotive technology firm located in Reno, Nevada. DealerTrend specializes in dealer websites, inventory management, and API-driven digital solutions. Established in 2001, DealerTrend brings a wealth of experience and expertise to the table as a well-known player in the industry.

data.title: WellNow and EB Medicine collaborate to enhance clinician training nationwide. WellNow is a top urgent care provider with a rapidly growing network in the US.
data.description: A collaborative effort between key industry players aims to establish a groundbreaking benchmark in urgent care training and expertise. On September 12, 2025, WellNow Urgent Care, a top player in the urgent care sector renowned for its rapidly expanding presence across the nation, revealed a strategic partnership focusing on...

data.title: Crypto IPOs soar: Gemini, Figure debut at billion-dollar valuations, amid rising interest in tokenization. Gensler texts raise concerns.
data.description: Gemini and Figure make their debut in the public market with valuations exceeding a billion dollars each. The tokenization trend on Wall Street is on the rise this week, with companies capitalizing on this opportunity.

data.title: SR Bancorp, Inc. corrects Q4 & annual financial results, reporting net income of $2.2 million for Q4 & $5.1 million for the year, assets of $1.08 billion, loans $797.2 million, deposits $846 million. Company also experienced an increase in interest income, noninterest income, and decrease in noninterest expense. More details available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: SR Bancorp, Inc., the holding company for Somerset Regal Bank, issued a corrected press release on Sept. 12, 2025, revealing financial results for the quarter and year ended June 30, 2025. They recognized $1.5 million gains from life insurance and adjusted credit loss allowances, resulting in revised figures: Provision for credit losses increased from $81 to $238 for the quarter and from a negative $24 to $133 for the year. Net income rose from $823 to $2,212 for the quarter and from $3,747 to $5,136 for the year. Total assets increased by 6.2%, with loans up by 8.9% and deposits increasing by 4.8% from the previous year. Noninterest income jumped by 152.2%, and noninterest expense rose by 3.3%. The Bank reported a provision for credit losses of $238,000 for the quarter and $133,000 for the year, with a non-performing loan value reduction from $50,000 to $0 year-over-year. Total assets were $1.08 billion, with net loans at $797.2 million, deposits at $846.0 million, and total equity at $193.8 million at June 30, 2025. The Bank saw the net interest income rise from $29.4 million to $29.6 million year-over-year, along with a $210,000 increase in the margin. The provision for credit losses decreased from $4.1 million to $133,000 year-over-year, adjusted due to revised quantitative loss factors. The Bank's net income stood at $5.1 million, up from a net loss of $10.9 million in the previous year. UIAlertificant increases in interest income, noninterest income, net interest income, and net income attributed to distinct gains and adjustments throughout the year.

data.title: KB Home opens Belcourt Place in El Monte, CA with modern homes for today's living. nyse: KBH.
data.description: In El Monte, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled Belcourt Place, a new-home community catering to modern living. Situated in a vibrant city known for its cultural richness and family-friendly activities, the homes offer contemporary designs with spacious great rooms and modern kitchens. El Monte provides a dynamic mix of dining, shopping, and entertainment options, making it an appealing location for potential homeowners. With KB Home's reputation as one of the leading homebuilders in the U.S., the grand opening of Belcourt Place introduces a new housing option in this desirable area.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics granted stock options to a new employee under Nasdaq Rule, improving patient lives with rare diseases.
data.description: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Cambridge, Mass., announced on Sept. 12, 2025, that they have granted non-statutory stock options to a new employee. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FULC, focuses on developing small molecules to help patients with rare genetic diseases. The stock options were granted under the company's 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan as part of the new employee agreement, complying with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This move aims to enhance the employee's engagement and align their interests with the company's success.

data.title: Ten-League International Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: TLIH) faces Nasdaq deficiency for not meeting $1.00 minimum bid price per share.
data.description: Singapore-based company Ten-League International Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: TLIH) received a deficiency notice from Nasdaq on September 9, 2025. The notice stated that the company did not meet the minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share for its ordinary shares over the 30 consecutive business days from July 25, 2025, to September 8, 2025. This puts the company at risk of losing its listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2).
